summary: FPV drones struck a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island, and a Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with the crew eliminated after a crash landing and during an evacuation attempt. Ukrainian forces reportedly used FPV drones to target Russian infantry, including a soldier charging with a bayonet and another hiding behind a tree, with two drones hitting him simultaneously. A 59th Brigade FPV drone is said to have downed a Russian Ka-52 on the Pokrovsk front, later confirmed and honored by Zelensky with the Order of Courage, 2nd class. Separately, an Iranian-backed militia used a fiber-optic FPV drone to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport, Iraq.
